tags.name: About
tags.description: Retrieves the version information for this NiFi Registry.

tags.name: Access
tags.description: Endpoints for obtaining an access token or checking access status.

tags.name: BucketBundles
tags.description: Create extension bundles scoped to an existing bucket in the registry.

tags.name: BucketFlows
tags.description: Create flows scoped to an existing bucket in the registry.

tags.name: Buckets
tags.description: Create named buckets in the registry to store NiFi objects such flows and extensions. Search for and retrieve existing buckets.

tags.name: Bundles
tags.description: Gets metadata about extension bundles and their versions.

tags.name: Config
tags.description: Retrieves the configuration for this NiFi Registry.

tags.name: ExtensionRepository
tags.description: Interact with extension bundles via the hierarchy of bucket/group/artifact/version.

tags.name: Items
tags.description: Retrieve items across all buckets for which the user is authorized.

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Endpoint for managing users and user groups.
